nasb.text: He made 300 shields of beaten gold, using three minas of gold on each shield, and the king put them in the house of the forest of Lebanon.

esv.text: And he made 300 shields of beaten gold; three minas of gold went into each shield. And the king put them in the House of the Forest of Lebanon.

cnv.text: 又用錘煉好的金子做了三百面小盾牌，每一面小盾牌用金子兩公斤。王把這些盾牌都放在黎巴嫩林宮。

ccb.text: 又用锤好的金子打造了三百面小盾牌，每面用三点五公斤金子，全部存放在黎巴嫩林宫。
